derivation_note: Ground-plane values below are estimated by visual inspection of the plate (no camera-calibration tooling exists in this repo) -- treat as art-directed estimates, not measured facts. Recorded explicitly so a future cycle can replace this with a real vanishing-point/line detector if precision matters.

calibration.note: Trash can bottom/top sampled directly from the plate; used as the scale proxy because its apparent size at that depth is closer to Static's chibi scale than the human-height doorway also visible in the plate.

light_sources.note: Nearest streetlamp cone, casts down-and-slightly-right onto the sidewalk area where the character is placed.
MONKEY sign glow, bounces warm-magenta fill light and produces the magenta puddle reflection at screen-left.
Zoo sign glow, secondary bounce fill from screen-left.
